question: ABC ত্রিভুজ c = 3.8 সে. মি. a = 5.2 সে. মি. এবং কোণ A = 35° হলে B কোণের মান কত হবে?
explanation: asin\begin{array}{l} \frac{a}{\sin A}=\frac{b}{\sin B}=\frac{c}{\sin C} \\ \Rightarrow \frac{5.2}{\sin 35^{\circ}}=\frac{b}{\sin B}=\frac{3.8}{\sin C} \Rightarrow \sin C=\frac{3.8 \sin 35^{\circ}}{5.2} \\ \Rightarrow C=\sin ^{-1}\left(\frac{3.8 \sin 35^{\circ}}{5.2}\right)=24^{\circ} 46^{\prime} \\ \therefore A+B+C=180^{\circ} \\ \Rightarrow 35^{\circ}+B+24^{\circ} 46^{\prime}=180^{\circ} \\ \Rightarrow B=180^{\circ}-35^{\circ}-24^{\circ} 46^{\prime}=120.2^{\circ} \end{array} sinAa=sinBb=sinCc
subject: Math

question: ΔABC তে c cosA+a cosC এর সমান কোনটি?
explanation:
\cos C+c \cos B a=bcosC+ccosB b=ccos\cos A+a \cos C

c=a \cos B+b \cos A b=ccosA+acosC

c=acosB+bcosA.

question: ABC \mathrm{ABC} ABC ত্রিভুজে cos\cos \mathrm{A}+\cos \mathrm{C}=\sin \mathrm{B} cosA+cosC=sinB হলে ∠A \angle A ∠A সমান-
explanation: প্রদত্ত সমস্যাটি সমাধান করতে আমরা নিস্নলিখিত ধাপগুলি অনুসরণ করব: 1. প্রদত্ত তথ্য বিশ্লেষণঃ △ABC \triangle A B C △ABC ত্রিষুজে cos\cos A+\cos C=\sin B cosA+cosC=sinB আমাদের ∠A \angle A ∠A এর মান নির্ণয় করতে হবে। 2. ত্রিভুডের কোণের সম্পর্ক ব্যবহার: যেকোনো ত্রিভুজে কোণের সমষ্টি \circ} A+B+C=180∘ সুতরাং, \circ}-A-B C=180∘−A−B 3. cos\cos C cosC কে cos\cos \left(180^{\circ}-A-B\right) cos(180∘−A−B) शिजেবে প্রকাশ: cos\cos \left(180^{\circ}-A-B\right)=-\cos (A+B) cos(180∘−A−B)=−cos(A+B) সুতরাং, cos\cos C=-\cos (A+B) cosC=−cos(A+B) 4. প্রদত্ত সমীকরণে মান বসানো: cos\cos A+\cos C=\sin B cosA+cosC=sinB cos\cos A-\cos (A+B)=\sin B cosA−cos(A+B)=sinB 5. cos\cos (A+B) cos(A+B) কে প্রসারণ: cos\cos (A+B)=\cos A \cos B-\sin A \sin B cos(A+B)=cosAcosB−sinAsinB সুতরাং, cos\cos A-(\cos A \cos B-\sin A \sin B)=\sin B cosA−(cosAcosB−sinAsinB)=sinB সরলীকরণ করলে পাই: cos\cos A(1-\cos B)+\sin A \sin B=\sin B cosA(1−cosB)+sinAsinB=sinB 6. সমীকরণটি সমাধান: cos\cos A(1-\cos B)+\sin A \sin B=\sin B cosA(1−cosB)+sinAsinB=sinB cos\cos A(1-\cos B)=\sin B(1-\sin A) cosA(1−cosB)=sinB(1−sinA) 7. ∠A \angle A ∠A এবং ∠B \angle B ∠B এর সম্পর্ক নির্ণয়: এই সমীকরণটি সমাধান করে আমরা পাই ∠\angle A=90^{\circ} ∠A=90∘
subject: Math

question: (a+b+c)(b+c−a)=3bc\left(a+b+c\right)\left(b+c-a\right)=3bc(a+b+c)(b+c−a)=3bc হলে, A=?A=?A=?
explanation: (\begin{array}{l}(a+b+c)(b+c-a)=3 b c \\ \Rightarrow\{(b+c)+a\}(b+c-a)=3 b{c} \\ \Rightarrow(b+c)^{2}-a^{2}=3 b c \\ \Rightarrow b^{2}+2 b c+c^{2}-a^{2}=3 b c \\ \Rightarrow b^{2}+c^{2}-a^{2}=b c \\ \therefore \frac{b^{2}+c^{2}-a^{2}}{b c}=1 \\ \Rightarrow \quad \frac{b^{2}+c^{2}-a^{2}}{2 b c}=\frac{1}{2} \\ \therefore cosA =\frac{1}{2} \\ \therefore A=cos^{-1} \frac{1}{2}=\frac{\pi}{3}=60\end{array} (a+b+c)(b+c−a)=3bc
subject: Math
explanationLatex: (\pi 3=60 \begin{array}{l}(a+b+c)(b+c-a)=3 b c \\ \Rightarrow\{(b+c)+a\}(b+c-a)=3 b{c} \\ \Rightarrow(b+c)^{2}-a^{2}=3 b c \\ \Rightarrow b^{2}+2 b c+c^{2}-a^{2}=3 b c \\ \Rightarrow b^{2}+c^{2}-a^{2}=b c \\ \therefore \frac{b^{2}+c^{2}-a^{2}}{b c}=1 \\ \Rightarrow \quad \frac{b^{2}+c^{2}-a^{2}}{2 b c}=\frac{1}{2} \\ \therefore cosA =\frac{1}{2} \\ \therefore A=cos^{-1} \frac{1}{2}=\frac{\pi}{3}=60\end{array} (a+b+c)(b+c−a)=3bc\pi =60

question: একটি ত্রিভুজের বড় দুটি পার্শ্বের দৈর্ঘ্য যথাক্রমে 10 এবং 9। যদি কোণ গুলো A.P তে থাকে তবে ৩য় পার্শ্বের দৈর্ঘ্য কত?
explanation: \angle \mathrm{A}>\angle \mathrm{B}>\angle \mathrm{C} ∠A>∠B>∠C Angle are in A.P. Therefore, ∠C=θ−d,∠B=θ \angle \mathrm{C}=\theta-\mathrm{d}, \angle \mathrm{B}=\theta ∠C=θ−d,∠B=θ and ∠A=θ+d \angle A=\theta+d ∠A=θ+d As ∠A+∠B+∠C=180∘ \angle \mathrm{A}+\angle \mathrm{B}+\angle \mathrm{C}=180^{\circ} ∠A+∠B+∠C=180∘ \Rightarrow \theta+\mathrm{d}+\theta+\theta-\mathrm{d}=180^{\circ} \Rightarrow 3 \theta=180^{\circ} \Rightarrow \theta=60^{\circ} \triangle \mathrm{ABC} △ABC, we have cos\begin{array}{l} \cos B=\frac{a^{2}+c^{2}-b^{2}}{2 a c} \\ \cos 60^{\circ}=\frac{(10)^{2}+x^{2}-9^{2}}{2 \times 10 \times x} \\ \Rightarrow \frac{1}{2}=\frac{100+x^{2}-9^{2}}{20 x} \\ \Rightarrow x^{2}-10 x+19=0 \\ \Rightarrow x=\frac{10 \pm \sqrt{100-76}}{2} \\ =\frac{10 \pm \sqrt{24}}{2}=5 \pm \sqrt{6} \end{array} cosB=2aca2+c2−b2cos60∘=2

question: ABC ত্রিভুজে a2+b2-c2=ab হলে C কোণের মান কত?
explanation: আমরা জানি, △\begin{aligned} \triangle A B C , \cos C & =\frac{a^{2}+b^{2}-c^{2}}{2 a b} \\ & =\frac{a b}{2 a b} \\ & =\frac{1}{2} \\ \therefore C & =60^{\circ} \end{aligned} △ABC,cosC

question: sinx sin(x+30°) + cosx sin(x+120°) এর মান কত?
explanation: sin\begin{aligned} &\sin x \sin \left(x+30^{\circ}\right)+\cos x \sin \left(x+120^{\circ}\right) \\ = & \sin x \sin \left(x+30^{\circ}\right)+\cos x \sin \left(90^{\circ}+30^{\circ}+x\right) \\ = & \sin x \sin \left(x+30^{\circ}\right)+\cos x \cos \left(x+30^{\circ}\right) \\ = & \cos \left\{\left(x+30^{\circ}\right)-x\right\} \\ = & \cos 30^{\circ}=\frac{\sqrt{3}}{2}\end{aligned} ====sinxsin(x+30∘)+cosxsin(x+120∘)sinxsin(x+30∘)+cosxsin(90∘+30∘+x)sinxsin(x+30∘)+cosxcos(x+30∘)cos{(x+30∘)−x}cos30∘=23
subject: Math
questionLatex: $sinx sin(x+30^{\\circ}) + cosx sin(x+120^{\\circ}) এর মান কত?$
explanationLatex: sin\begin{aligned} &\sin x \sin \left(x+30^{\circ}\right)+\cos x \sin \left(x+120^{\circ}\right) \\ = & \sin x \sin \left(x+30^{\circ}\right)+\cos x \sin \left(90^{\circ}+30^{\circ}+x\right) \\ = & \sin x \sin \left(x+30^{\circ}\right)+\cos x \cos \left(x+30^{\circ}\right) \\ = & \cos \left\{\left(x+30^{\circ}\right)-x\right\} \\ = & \cos 30^{\circ}=\frac{\sqrt{3}}{2}\end{aligned} ====sinxsin(x+30∘)+cosxsin(x+120∘)sinxsin(x+30∘)+cosxsin(90∘+30∘+x)sinxsin(x+30∘)+cosxcos(x+30∘)cos{(x+30∘)−x}cos30∘=23

question: sin\sin x=\mathrm{k} \sin y sinx=ksiny হলে tan\tan \frac{x-y}{2}= tan2x−y=

options.a: 𝑘 − 1 𝑘 + 1 tan ⁡ 𝑥 + 𝑦 2 k+1 k−1 tan 2 x+y
options.b: 𝑘 − 1 𝑘 + 1 tan ⁡ 𝑥 − 𝑦 2 k+1 k−1 tan 2 x−y
options.c: 𝑘 + 1 𝑘 − 1 tan ⁡ 𝑥 + 𝑦 2 k−1 k+1 tan 2 x+y
options.d: 𝑘 − 1 𝑘 + 1 tan ⁡ 𝑥 + 𝑦 4 k+1 k−1 tan 4 x+y

explanation: দেওয়া আছে, sin\sin x=\mathrm{k} \sin y sinx=ksiny \begin{array}{l} \Rightarrow \frac{\sin x}{\sin y}=\frac{k}{1} \Rightarrow \frac{\sin x+\sin y}{\sin x-\sin y}=\frac{k+1}{k-1} \\ \Rightarrow \frac{2 \sin \frac{x+y}{2} \cos \frac{x-y}{2}}{2 \sin \frac{x-y}{2} \cos \frac{x+y}{2}}=\frac{k+1}{k-1} \\ \Rightarrow \frac{\tan \frac{x+y}{2}}{\tan \frac{x-y}{2}}=\frac{k+1}{k-1} . \\ \therefore \tan \frac{x-y}{2}=\frac{k-1}{k+1} \tan \frac{x+y}{2} \end{array}

question: tan\tanθ=\frac{y}{x}tanθ=xy হলে, xcos\cos2θ+y\sin2θxcos2θ+ysin2θ এর মান-
explanation: xcos\begin{aligned} & x \cos 2 \theta+y \sin 2 \theta \\ = & x \cdot \frac{1-\tan ^{2} \theta}{1+\tan ^{2} \theta}+y \cdot \frac{2\tan \theta}{1+\tan ^{2} \theta} \\ = & x \cdot \frac{1-\frac{y^{2}}{x^{2}}}{1+\frac{y^{2}}{x^{2}}}+y \cdot \frac{2 \frac{y}{x}}{1+\frac{y^{2}}{x^{2}}}\end{aligned} ==xcos2θ+ysin2θx⋅1+tan2θ1−tan2θ+y⋅1+tan2θ2tanθx⋅1+x2y21−x2y2+y⋅1+x2y22xy =x⋅(x2−y2x2\cdot\left(\frac{x^{2}-y^{2}}{x^{2}} \times \frac{x^{2}}{x^{2}+y^{2}}\right)+y\left(\frac{2 y}{x} \times \frac{x^{2}}{x^{2}+y^{2}}\right) =x⋅(x2x2−y2\cdot \frac{x^{2}-y^{2}}{x^{2}+y^{2}}+y \cdot \frac{2 x y}{x^{2}+y^{2}} =x⋅x2+y2x2−y2+y⋅x2+y22xy =x3−xy2x2+y2+2xy2x2+yz =\frac{x^{3}-x y^{2}}{x^{2}+y^{2}}+\frac{2 x y^{2}}{x^{2}+y z} =x2+y2x3−xy2+x2+yz2xy2 =x3−xy2+2xy2x2+y2=x3+xy2x2+y2=x(x2+y2)x2+y2=x \begin{aligned}=\frac{x^{3}-x y^{2}+2 x y^{2}}{x^{2}+y^{2}} & =\frac{x^{3}+x y^{2}}{x^{2}+y^{2}} =\frac{x\left(x^{2}+y^{2}\right)}{x^{2}+y^{2}}=x\end{aligned} =x2+y2x3−xy2+2xy2=x2+y2x3+xy2=x2+y2x(x2+y2)=x

questionLatex: tan⁡\\theta =yx\tan\\theta =\frac{y}{x}tan\\theta =xy হলে, xcos\theta +ysin\theta x\cos2\\theta +y\sin2\\theta xcos2\\theta +ysin2\\theta এর মান-
explanationLatex: $xcos⁡2\\theta +ysin⁡2\\theta =x⋅1−tan⁡2\\theta 1+tan⁡2\\theta +y⋅2tan⁡\\theta 1+tan⁡2\\theta =x⋅1−y2x21+y2x2+y⋅2yx1+y2x2 \begin{aligned} & x \cos 2 \theta+y \sin 2 \theta \\ = & x \cdot \frac{1-\tan ^{2} \theta}{1+\tan ^{2} \theta}+y \cdot \frac{2\tan \theta}{1+\tan ^{2} \theta} \\ = & x \cdot \frac{1-\frac{y^{2}}{x^{2}}}{1+\frac{y^{2}}{x^{2}}}+y \cdot \frac{2 \frac{y}{x}}{1+\frac{y^{2}}{x^{2}}}\end{aligned} ==xcos2\\theta +ysin2\\theta x⋅1+tan2\\theta 1−tan2\\theta +y⋅1+tan2\\theta 2tan\\theta x⋅1+x2y21−x2y2+y⋅1+x2y22xy =x⋅(x2−y2x2\\times x2x2+y2)+y(2yx\\times x2x2+y2) =x \cdot\left(\frac{x^{2}-y^{2}}{x^{2}} \times \frac{x^{2}}{x^{2}+y^{2}}\right)+y\left(\frac{2 y}{x} \times \frac{x^{2}}{x^{2}+y^{2}}\right) =x⋅(x2x2−y2\\times x2+y2x2)+y(x2y\\times x2+y2x2) =x⋅x2−y2x2+y2+y⋅2xyx2+y2 =x \cdot \frac{x^{2}-y^{2}}{x^{2}+y^{2}}+y \cdot \frac{2 x y}{x^{2}+y^{2}} =x⋅x2+y2x2−y2+y⋅x2+y22xy =x3−xy2x2+y2+2xy2x2+yz =\frac{x^{3}-x y^{2}}{x^{2}+y^{2}}+\frac{2 x y^{2}}{x^{2}+y z} =x2+y2x3−xy2+x2+yz2xy2 =x3−xy2+2xy2x2+y2=x3+xy2x2+y2=x(x2+y2)x2+y2=x \begin{aligned}=\frac{x^{3}-x y^{2}+2 x y^{2}}{x^{2}+y^{2}} & =\frac{x^{3}+x y^{2}}{x^{2}+y^{2}} =\frac{x\left(x^{2}+y^{2}\right)}{x^{2}+y^{2}}=x\end{aligned} =x2+y2x3−xy2+2xy2=x2+y2x3+xy2=x2+y2x(x2+y2)=x$

question: sin\sin \mathrm{A}+\cos \mathrm{A}=\sin \mathrm{B}+\cos B, A+B= sinA+cosA=sinB+cosB,A+B= ?
explanation: Sol. সমাধান: (\sin A+\cos A=\sin B+\cos B \Rightarrow \sin A-\sin B=\cos B-\cos A \Rightarrow 2 \sin \frac{A-B}{2} \cos \frac{A+B}{2} sinA+cosA=sinB+cosB\sin \frac{A+B}{2} \sin \frac{A-B}{2} \Rightarrow \cos \frac{A+B}{2}=\sin \frac{A+B}{2} \Rightarrow \cos \frac{A+B}{2}=\cos \left(\frac{\pi}{2}-\frac{A+B}{2}\right) \Rightarrow \frac{A+B}{2}=\frac{\pi}{2}-\frac{A+B}{2} \Rightarrow A+B=\frac{\pi}{2} =2sin2A+Bsin2A−B
subject: Math
explanationLatex: Sol. সমাধান: (\sin A+\cos A=\sin B+\cos B \Rightarrow \sin A-\sin B=\cos B-\cos A \Rightarrow 2 \sin \frac{A-B}{2} \cos \frac{A+B}{2} sinA+cosA=sinB+cosB\pi 2−A+B2)\pi 2−A+B2\pi 2 =2 \sin \frac{A+B}{2} \sin \frac{A-B}{2} \Rightarrow \cos \frac{A+B}{2}=\sin \frac{A+B}{2} \Rightarrow \cos \frac{A+B}{2}=\cos \left(\frac{\pi}{2}-\frac{A+B}{2}\right) \Rightarrow \frac{A+B}{2}=\frac{\pi}{2}-\frac{A+B}{2} \Rightarrow A+B=\frac{\pi}{2} =2sin2A+Bsin2A−B\pi −2A+B)\pi −2A+B\pi

question: tan54° - tan36° এর মান-
explanation: আমরা জানি, tan\tan (A-B) tan(A−B) এর সূত্র: tan\tan (A-B)=\frac{\tan A-\tan B}{1+\tan A \tan B} tan(A−B)=1+tanAtanBtanA−tanB এখানে \circ} A=54∘ এবং B=36∘ B=36^{\circ} B=36∘, A−B=18∘ A-B=18^{\circ} A−B=18∘ : tan\begin{array}{c} \tan \left(54^{\circ}-36^{\circ}\right)=\tan 18^{\circ} \\ \tan 18^{\circ}=\frac{\tan 54^{\circ}-\tan 36^{\circ}}{1+\tan 54^{\circ} \tan 36^{\circ}} \end{array} tan(54∘−36∘)=tan18∘tan18∘=1+tan54∘tan36∘tan54∘−tan36∘ তাহলে: tan\tan 54^{\circ}-\tan 36^{\circ}=\tan 18^{\circ} \times\left(1+\tan 54^{\circ} \tan 36^{\circ}\right) tan54∘−tan36∘=tan18∘\circ} 54∘ এবং 36∘ 36^{\circ} 36∘ এর কোপগুলির মধ্যে সम्পর্ক থাকার কারণে আমরা পাই: tan\tan 54^{\circ} \tan 36^{\circ}=1 tan54∘tan36∘=1 তাহলে: \text { tan } 54^{\circ}-\tan 36^{\circ}=\tan 18^{\circ} \times(1+1)=2 \tan 18^{\circ} tan 54∘−tan36∘=tan18∘
subject: Math
explanationLatex: আমরা জানি, tan\tan (A-B) tan(A−B) এর সূত্র: tan\tan (A-B)=\frac{\tan A-\tan B}{1+\tan A \tan B} tan(A−B)=1+tanAtanBtanA−tanB এখানে \circ} A=54∘ এবং B=36∘ B=36^{\circ} B=36∘, A−B=18∘ A-B=18^{\circ} A−B=18∘ : tan\begin{array}{c} \tan \left(54^{\circ}-36^{\circ}\right)=\tan 18^{\circ} \\ \tan 18^{\circ}=\frac{\tan 54^{\circ}-\tan 36^{\circ}}{1+\tan 54^{\circ} \tan 36^{\circ}} \end{array} tan(54∘−36∘)=tan18∘tan18∘=1+tan54∘tan36∘tan54∘−tan36∘ তাহলে: tan\times (1+tan\tan 54^{\circ}-\tan 36^{\circ}=\tan 18^{\circ} \times\left(1+\tan 54^{\circ} \tan 36^{\circ}\right) tan54∘−tan36∘=tan18∘\\times (1+tan54∘tan36∘) 54∘ 54^{\circ} 54∘ এবং 36∘ 36^{\circ} 36∘ এর কোপগুলির মধ্যে সम्পর্ক থাকার কারণে আমরা পাই: tan\tan 54^{\circ} \tan 36^{\circ}=1 tan54∘tan36∘=1 তাহলে: \times (1+1)=2tan\text { tan } 54^{\circ}-\tan 36^{\circ}=\tan 18^{\circ} \times(1+1)=2 \tan 18^{\circ} tan 54∘−tan36∘=tan18∘\\times (1+1)=2tan18∘

question: নিচের কোনটি cosA বা sinA এর বহুপদী রূপে cos3A কে প্রকাশ করে?
subject: Math
questionLatex: নিচের কোনটি cosA বা sinA এর বহুপদী রূপে cos3A কে প্রকাশ করে?

question: sinএবংcosহলে, \sin{A} = \frac{1}{2} এ ব ং \cos{B} = \frac{1}{\sqrt{2}} হ ল ে , sinA=21এবংcosB=21হলে, cos(A+B) এর মান কত হবে ?
explanation: sin\begin{array}{ll} \sin A=\frac{1}{2}, & \cos B=\frac{1}{\sqrt{2}} \\ \therefore A=30^{\circ} & \therefore B=45^{\circ} \end{array} sinA=21,\begin{aligned} \cos (A+B) & =\cos A \cdot \cos B-\sin A \cdot \sin B \\ & =\cos 30^{\circ} \cdot \cos 45^{\circ}-\sin 30^{\circ} \cdot \sin 45^{\circ} \\ & =\frac{\sqrt{3}}{2} \cdot \frac{1}{\sqrt{2}}-\frac{1}{2} \cdot \frac{1}{\sqrt{2}} \\ & =\frac{\sqrt{3}-1}{2 \sqrt{2}} \end{aligned} cos(A+B)=cosA⋅cosB−sinA⋅sinB=cos30∘⋅cos45∘−sin30∘⋅sin45∘=23⋅21−21⋅21=223−1
subject: Math
questionLatex: sinএবংcosহলে, \sin{A} = \frac{1}{2} এ ব ং \cos{B} = \frac{1}{\sqrt{2}} হ ল ে , sinA=21এবংcosB=21হলে, cos(A+B) এর মান কত হবে ?
explanationLatex: sin\begin{array}{ll} \sin A=\frac{1}{2}, & \cos B=\frac{1}{\sqrt{2}} \\ \therefore A=30^{\circ} & \therefore B=45^{\circ} \end{array} sinA=21,\begin{aligned} \cos (A+B) & =\cos A \cdot \cos B-\sin A \cdot \sin B \\ & =\cos 30^{\circ} \cdot \cos 45^{\circ}-\sin 30^{\circ} \cdot \sin 45^{\circ} \\ & =\frac{\sqrt{3}}{2} \cdot \frac{1}{\sqrt{2}}-\frac{1}{2} \cdot \frac{1}{\sqrt{2}} \\ & =\frac{\sqrt{3}-1}{2 \sqrt{2}} \end{aligned} cos(A+B)=cosA⋅cosB−sinA⋅sinB=cos30∘⋅cos45∘−sin30∘⋅sin45∘=23⋅21−21⋅21=223−1

question: cot\cot \alpha+\cot \beta=a, \tan \alpha+\tan \beta=b cotα+cotβ=a,tanα+tanβ=b এবং α+β=θ \alpha+\beta=\theta α+β=θ হলে, cot\cot \theta cotθ মান কোনটি?
subject: Math
questionLatex: cot\cot \alpha+\cot \beta=a, \tan \alpha+\tan \beta=b cotα+cotβ=a,tanα+tanβ=b এবং α+β=\\theta \alpha+\beta=\theta α+β=\\theta হলে, cot⁡\\theta \cot \theta cot\\theta মান কোনটি?
explanationLatex: cot\begin{array}{l}\cot (\alpha+\beta)=\frac{\cot \alpha \cot \beta-1}{\cot \alpha+\cot \beta} \\ \Rightarrow \cot \alpha \cot \beta-1=\cot (\alpha+\beta)(\cot \alpha+\cot \beta)\end{array} cot(α+β)=cotα+cotβcotαcotβ−1\theta ⋅a=acot⁡\\theta =\cot \theta \cdot a=a \cot \theta =cot\\theta ⋅a=acot\\theta \theta \begin{array}{c}\Rightarrow \cot \alpha \cot \beta=\operatorname{cot \theta} + 1 \\ \tan (\alpha+\beta)=\frac{\tan \alpha+\tan \beta}{1-\tan \alpha \tan \beta}\end{array} \theta +1tan(α+β)=1−tanαtanβtanα+tanβ \theta =b1−1cot\theta \theta acot⁡\\theta +1=\frac{b1}{cot}⁡\\theta \begin{array}{l}\Rightarrow \tan \theta=\frac{b}{1-\frac{1}{\cot \alpha} \frac{1}{\cot \beta}} \\ \Rightarrow \frac{\cot \alpha \cot \beta-1}{\cot \alpha \cot \beta}=\frac{b}{\tan \theta} \\ \Rightarrow \frac{a \cot \theta}{a \cot \theta+1}=\frac{b}{1 / \cot \theta}\end{array} \theta =1−cotα1cotβ1b\theta b\theta +1acot\\theta =\frac{1}{cot}\\theta b \theta +1=b\theta +1=ab\theta =ab−1\theta =ab−1a=1b−1a. \begin{array}{l}\Rightarrow \frac{a}{a \cot \theta+1}=b \\ \Rightarrow \quad a \operatorname{cot} \theta +1 =\frac{a}{b} \\ \Rightarrow \operatorname{acot} \theta=\frac{a}{b}-1 \\ \Rightarrow \cot \theta=\frac{\frac{a}{b}-1}{a}=\frac{1}{b}-\frac{1}{a} .\end{array} \theta +1a=b\theta +1=ba\theta =ba−1\theta =aba−1=b1−a1.

question: acos\cos \theta+b \sin \theta=\mathrm{c} acosθ+bsinθ=c সমীকরণটি θ \theta θ এর দুইটি ভিন্ন মান α,β \alpha, \beta α,β দ্বারা সিদ্ধ হলে , sin\sin (\alpha+\beta)=? sin(α+β)=?

options.b: 𝑎 𝑏 𝑎 2 + 𝑏 2 a 2 +b 2 ab

explanation: \cos \theta+\mathrm{b} \sin \theta=\mathrm{c} cosθ+bsinθ=c সমীকরণটি θ \theta θ এর দুইটি ভিন্ন মান α≪β \alpha \ll \beta α≪β দ্বারা সিদ্ধ বলে, acos\cos \alpha+b \sin \alpha=c acosα+bsinα=cএবং acos\cos \beta+b \sin \beta=c acosβ+bsinβ=c \begin{array}{l} \therefore \quad a \cos \alpha+b \sin \alpha=a \cos \beta+b \sin \beta \\ \Rightarrow \quad a(\cos \alpha-\cos \beta)=b(\sin \beta-\sin \alpha) \\ \Rightarrow a \cdot 2 \sin \frac{1}{2}(\alpha+\beta) \sin \frac{1}{2}(\beta-\alpha) \\ =b \cdot 2 \cos \frac{1}{2}(\alpha+\beta) \sin \frac{1}{2}(\beta-\alpha) \\ \alpha \neq \beta \text { } \sin \frac{1}{2}(\beta-\alpha) \neq 0 \\ \therefore a \sin \frac{1}{2}(\alpha+\beta)=b \cos \frac{1}{2}(\alpha+\beta) \\ \Rightarrow \tan \frac{1}{2}(\alpha+\beta)=\frac{b}{a} \end{array} এখন, sin\sin (\alpha+\beta)=\sin 2 \cdot \frac{1}{2}(\alpha+\beta) sin(α+β)=sin2⋅21(α+β) =2tan\begin{array}{l} =\frac{2 \tan \frac{1}{2}(\alpha+\beta)}{1+\tan ^{2} \frac{1}{2}(\alpha+\beta)}=-\frac{2 \frac{b}{a}}{1+\left(\frac{b}{a}\right)^{2}} \\ =\frac{2 b}{a} \times \frac{a^{2}}{a^{2}+b^{2}}=\frac{2 a b}{a^{2}+b^{2}} \end{array} =1+tan221(α+β)2tan21(α+β)=−1+(ab)22ab=a2b
subject: Math
